texts.full_text: of human triple-negative breast cancer. Currently, traditional predictors of prognosis (tumor size, nodal status, progesterone receptor [PR], estrogen receptor [ER], or human epidermal growth factor receptor-2 [HER2]) are insufficient for precise survival prediction for triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC). Long noncoding RNAs (lncRNAs) have been observed to exert critical functions in cancer, including in TNBC. Nevertheless, systematically tracking expression-based lncRNA biomarkers based on the sequence data for the prediction of prognosis in TNBC has not yet been investigated. To ascertain whether biomarkers exist that can distinguish TNBC from adjacent normal tissue or nTNBC, we implemented a comprehensive analysis of lncRNA expression profiles and clinical data of 1097 BC samples from The Cancer Genome Atlas database. Joseph Marien is noted mainly because during 1920s - the early era of marathon racing when it was not yet standardized at its current distance (the Olympic standard since set as precisely to be about that length) but still an event in many sporting competitions, he represented Belgium on multiple occasions. He participated twice for his country's team: firstly representing them during 1924 Paris Olympics and later again with the Antwerp Cup held a year after. His marathon career began when at age of twenty-four Joseph Charles Marien ran under Belgian flag completing an Olympic Marathon in two hours, fifty-two minutes which placed him fifth. texts.full_text: value system. DESCRIPTION: The KKW consists of 25 items (of which 24 are diagnostic). The questionnaire yields a global score and scores on the following sub-scales: H – difficulty in organising the value system into a hierarchy, Z – sense of loss of values, D – disintegration of evaluative functions, R – sense of lack of value realisation. RELIABILITY: High internal consistency of the whole scale and its individual subscales (Cronbach's alpha parameters rAnge from .85 to .92), indicating a consistent measure for identifying problems and disturbances in one’s value system. VALIDITY: The KKW has shown strong construct reliability, supported by both convergent and discriminant evaluation systems with other psychological tests linked to values and self-concept clarity. texts.full_text: image file. The following GFlags command displays the current value of the system-wide flags set in the registry. It uses the **/r** parameter to specify the system-wide registry entry. ```console gflags /r ``` In response, GFlags displays a single hexadecimal value representing the sum of all flags set and a list of the flags set. ```console current Boot Registry Settings are: 40001400 ptg - Enable pool tagging ust - Create user mode stack trace database bhd - Enable bad handles detection ``` In this example, the results show that there are three tags set, with a combined value of 0x40001400. - [Enable pool tagging](enable-pool-tagging.md) (ptg) = 0x400 - [Create user mode stack trace database](create-user-mode-stack-trace-database.md) (ust) = 0x1000 - [Enable bad handles detection](enable-bad-handles-detection.md) (bhd) = 0x40000000 The following command displays the flags set for the current session. It uses the **/k** parameter to indicate kernel mode. ```console gflags /k ``` the following command displays flags set in the registry for the image file notepad.exe. It uses the **/i** parameter to indicate image file mode and specifies the image file. ```console gflags /i notepad.exe ``` Remember that the flag value displayed might not be the current, effective flag value. Changes to the system-wide flags are not effective until you restart

texts.full_text: Cook N Play Kitchen £24.99 @ Debenhams This Hello Kitty cook and play kitchen is down from the usually rather heavy £49.99 to only £24.99 at Debenhams. You are saving £25 off the original price, very nice indeed, and it would make a great birthday pressie for a very lucky little girl. The Hello Kitty cook and play kitchen has all the features of a real kitchen such as a hob, oven and fridge and it comes with 12 kitchen play accessories too. The entire kitchen is very pretty to look at (if you like pink) and it will need quite a bit of space to set up, so make sure you have an area big enough to accommodate it. Parents will appreciate the quality of this kitchen set, as it's designed to withstand the wear and tear that comes with imaginative play. Children can pretend to cook up their favorite meals, learn about different kitchen tools, and engage in role-playing fun with their friends or siblings. In addition to the price reduction, Debenhams offers various payment options, making it more convenient for shoppers to purchase this set without breaking the bank. And with their excellent customer service, you can be assured that any issues will be handled promptly and efficiently. Overall, the Hello Kitty Cook N Play Kitchen is a fantastic addition to any child's playroom or bedroom, offering both educational and entertainment value. With its attractive design, realistic features, and impressive savings, it's easy to see why this set is a must-have for fans of the iconic character. So go ahead and treat your little one to this delightful play set – they'll be whipping up culinary masterpieces

texts.full_text: ttish Gaelic writing (with English translation included) so we’re always on the look out for such submissions. You’ll be publishing your first book on International Women’s Day (8 March 2017), can you tell us a bit more about Nasty Women? Nasty Women is a collection of essays and accounts on what it is to be a woman in the 21st century. Dubbed by the Huffington Post as ‘the intersectional essay collection feminists need’, around 20 women writers, new and established, have written pieces on their experiences in subjects ranging from being a half-Black woman in America to pregnancy and contraception, from gendered violence in the punk rock community to immigration and Brexit. It includes Laura Jane Grace (front woman of rock band Against Me!) in conversation with Sasha de Buyl-Pisco, Chitra Ramaswamy, Zeba Talkhani, Nadine Aisha Jassat, Laura Waddell and so many more. In a time where ‘post-truth’ and dangerously anti-woman rhetoric is becoming normalized in international political dialogue and agenda, we wanted to push back in whatever way we can. We believe that offering a platform to women who have important stories to share and points to make is the best way we can combat this rhetoric. What are your ambitions and hopes for 404 Ink? We were recently described as being a ‘cutting-edge’ Scottish publisher in an Independent article and this is a descriptor we’re keen to keep a hold of. It’s early days, of course, and we still have a lot to prove, but we think we will manage this with the eclectic list we’re planning and continued loud digital marketing that has seen us heard around the world. texts.full_text: hydrogenase (17beta-HSD) capacity of koala (Phascolarctos cinereus) and tammar wallaby (Macropus eugenii). A detailed comparison of the activity in hepatic fractions from koala and rat was made. Hepatic microsomal NADP-supported 17beta-HSD activity was significantly higher in koala (11.64+/-3.35 nmoles/mg protein/min), (mean+/-S.D.) than in tammar wallaby liver (1.52+/-0.79 nmoles/mg protein/min). However, when NAD was utilised as cofactor the activity was similar in both marsupial species (2.83+/-2.03 nmoles/mg protein/min, koala; 0.70+/-0.71 nmoles/mg protein/min, tammar wallaby). Data for rat indicated a cofactor preference for NAD rather than NADP (17.94+/-6.40 nmoles/mg protein/min, NAD; 2.18+/-1.04 nmoles/mg protein/min, NADP). The S3Remoteprovider allows stay_on_remote=True for the use case where you have the ability to run commands that accepts S3 pseudo-URLs for reading and writing (s3://bucket-name/full/key/value/to/data). This could either be a remote system, or something like samtools that accepts s3:// locations. If stay_on_remote=True, the protocol will be prepended to the file automatically if it is not specified, so for the S3 provider you don't need to explicitly include s3:// in the input file strings. For example, stay_on_remote=True can be used with samtools like this: from snakemake.remote.S3 import RemoteProvider as S3RemoteProvider S3 = S3RemoteProvider() rule all: input: S3.remote("1000genomes/phase1/data/NA12878/exome_alignment/NA12878.mapped.illumina.mosaik.CEU.exome.20110411.bam", stay_on_remote=True) output: "ou

Submit a request 1 Comments Date Votes 0 Chris Kyriakakis September 06, 2012 05:13 Hi s The MultiEQ and Bass Management features in Audyssey work together to enhance the overall sound quality of your audio system. Here's a breakdown: 1) Multi EQ (Multichannel Equalization): - This feature analyzes multiple channels simultaneously, adjusting their frequency response for optimal balance. 2) : * It divides frequencies and routes them to the appropriate speakers or subwoofers. For instance, L-C-R Roll-off at 80 Hz - Everything below 70-100Hz is sent directly into your LFE (Low Frequency Effects) channel, which typically connects with a dedicated bass/subwoofer. * When it comes to the wide channels like Center and Surrounds: Everything under 80 -110HZ will be routed downwards into your LFE. By doing this in each channel, Audyssey ensures that low-frequency information is accurately sent for powerful bass without overloading the speakers with too much sound below a certain frequency threshold. In terms of treating channels discretely: - The MultiEQ feature adjusts frequencies based on what it perceives as optimal balance across all your audio sources. * It doesn't just focus solely one channel at any given time, but rather optimizes overall performance by considering the entire system. Audyssey's advanced algorithms take into account room acoustics and speaker placement to ensure each frequency range is perfectly balanced for a more immersive experience

And in Part Three, I'll give you six tips for dealing with unsuspected stresses on your bodCauses of Anxiety When You Have Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) 1. Unpredictability: One of the main causes of anxiety when living with IBS is its unpredictable nature. Symptoms can flare up at any time, making it difficult to plan activities or social events without worrying about potential discomfort and embarrassment. This constant uncertainty can lead to a persistent state of high alertness, which contributes to overall stress levels. 2. Fear of Public Embarrassment: Many people with IBS experience anxiety due to the fear of having an accident in public or being unable to find a restroom when needed. These fears often stem from past experiences and can be quite debilitating, causing individuals to avoid social situations altogether. 3. Pain Management Concerns: Chronic pain is one of the most common symptoms associated with IBS. The fear that this discomfort will become unbearable or interfere significantly in daily life contributes greatly towards feelings of anxiety and stress among sufferers. 4. Lack of Control: Feeling like you have no control over your body's responses can be extremely frustrating, leading to increased levels of worry about when symptoms might strike next – further exacerbated by the fact that IBS triggers vary from person-to-person and even day-by-day. 5. Food Anxiety: For many people with IBS, certain foods act as triggers for symptom flareups. This leads to constant worry about what they can or cannot eat safely without experiencing discomfort later on – adding yet another layer of stress into their lives. 6. texts.full_text: d airway inflammation: role of CB1/CB2 receptors. The endocannabinoid system (ECS) consists of two cannabinoid (CB) receptors, namely CB(1) and CB(2) receptor, and their endogenous (endocannabinoids) and exogenous (cannabinoids, e.g. delta-9-tetrahydrocannabinol (THC)) ligands which bind to these receptors. Based on studies suggesting a role of THC and the ECS in inflammation, the objective of this study was to examine their involvement in type I hypersensitivity using a murine model of allergic airway inflammation. THC treatment of C57BL/6 wildtype mice dramatically reduced airway inflammation as determined by significantly reduced total cell counts in bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL). These effects were greatest when mice were treated during both, the sensitization and the challenge phase. Furthermore, systemic immune responses were significantly suppressed in mice treated with THC during the sensitization phase as indicated by decreased serum levels of antigen-specific immunoglobulins (IgG1 and IgE) and reduced spleen cell proliferation upon ex vivo restimulation. To investigate a potential role of CB receptors in these effects, the study was repeated using CB receptor knockout mice. The generally accepted water filtration system includes a pump which circulates water within the swimming pool, causing the swimming pool water to pass through a variety of filters and filtering devices. One filtering device which is common to most swimming pools is a pool skimmer which is typically installed in the side wall of the swimming pool, at or about the desired water level. Conventional pool skimmer devices may generally include a "trap" installed adjacent to an opening in the side wall of the swimming pool, wherein a weir or flap door may be installed in the opening which allows surface debris to float over the weir and into the trap. Once the debris has floated over the weir, the weir closes the opening as water and debris attempt to egress from trap, thus preventing the debris from returning to the swimming pool area. texts.full_text: learning process and provide immediate feedback. However, the effectiveness of these study methods can vary greatly depending on the individual's study habits and preferences. Online learning platforms have developed more dynamic ways to prepare for multiple-choice tests like the MBE. These platforms offer features such as adaptive learning algorithms that adjust the difficulty of answers based on the user's performance, as well as detailed explanations for each question. However, even these platforms may not adequately address the unique problems posed by the MBE, such as the need to accurately manage time and to understand complex legal concepts within a constrained timeframe. There is a need for a method and apparatus that can provide a more structured and effective approach to preparing for the MBE. This approach should utilize advanced techniques to simulate the test environment, provide real-time feedback, and adapt to the individual learning needs of the test-taker.
